content: I open sourced Codex Account Switcher: a macOS menu bar app to manage multiple Codex ChatGPT accounts, switch active auth in one click, and see 5h/weekly usage windows. Repo: https://github.com/naveenshaji/codex-account-switcher

If you’re manually editing ~/.codex/auth.json to switch accounts, this might help. Codex Account Switcher gives one-click switching + usage bars per account in the menu bar. OSS: https://github.com/naveenshaji/codex-account-switcher

Built a utility for heavy Codex workflows: add accounts via OAuth, pick active account, restart app/open CLI, and track remaining usage windows. Open source: https://github.com/naveenshaji/codex-account-switcher

[Open Source] Codex Account Switcher for macOS menu bar

I built and open sourced a small macOS menu bar utility called **Codex Account Switcher**.

It’s for people using Codex heavily across multiple accounts and getting tired of manually editing `~/.codex/auth.json`.

What it does:
- Store multiple account profiles
- One-click active account switch
- Show remaining 5-hour + weekly usage windows per account
- Quick actions to restart Codex app / open new CLI session

Repo: https://github.com/naveenshaji/codex-account-switcher

Happy to share implementation details if useful.

I made an OSS tool to switch Codex accounts from the menu bar

Launched a tiny OSS macOS utility: **Codex Account Switcher**.

It helps when you work across multiple Codex accounts and want faster switching + usage visibility without editing auth files manually.

Current focus is practical workflow speed (switch account, check 5h/weekly remaining, restart app/open CLI quickly).

Repo: https://github.com/naveenshaji/codex-account-switcher

Feedback welcome, especially from people running long Codex sessions daily.

author: dev_alpha
content:
I ran into this exact issue and built a small macOS menu bar tool for it. It keeps multiple Codex accounts saved and switches the active one by writing `~/.codex/auth.json` atomically, plus shows remaining 5h/weekly usage per account.

Maintainer note: I build Codex Account Switcher.
Repo: https://github.com/naveenshaji/codex-account-switcher
llm_rationale: More specific workflow detail, clearer value, and explicit maintainer disclosure.
